results.name: kylem
results.description: The plane of Battlebond, containing Valor's Reach Stadium.

results.name: kylem aven
results.description: Peacock based Aven, from the plane of Kylem (Battlebond)

results.name: kylem goblin
results.description: Goblins from Kylem, noted for their large ears

results.name: kynaios
results.description: A soldier of Theros, and lover of Tiro of Meletis.

results.name: kyoketsu-shoge
results.description: A bladed weapon attached to a rope or chain.

results.name: kyren
results.description: A goblin ruling class of Mercadia City.

results.name: la (avatar)
results.description: The ocean spirit from Avatar: The Last Airbender.

results.name: labrys
results.description: The labrys is a double-bitted axe rarely used in combat. It carries a variety of cultural meanings, and is associated with LGBT culture and lesbian pride in modern society.

results.name: lalafell
results.description: Short diminutive race in Final Fantasy XIV based off of [Tarutaru](tarutaru) from Final Fantasy XI. They've been called [Dwarves](dwarf) in the First and are typed as such.

results.name: lammasu
results.description: A creature with wings, the body of a goat or lion, and a human head (traditionally).

results.name: lampad
results.description: Black-aligned nymph of the Underworld.

results.name: lamprey mouth
results.description: Mouths that resemble a ring of teeth like a lamprey's

results.name: lance
results.description: A piercing polearm or spear used by cavalry.

results.name: land conversion
results.description: Effects that change or add land types and affect how lands produce mana.

results.name: landfall
results.description: Cards which reward you for playing lands.

results.name: landfall other
results.description: Effects that trigger when lands enter the battlefield under an opponent's control.

results.name: landhome
results.description: An old two-part mechanic: you had to control a land of a certain type to keep this creature on the battlefield, and the opponent needed to control a land of the same type to be attacked by it. It often got used in just one of the halves, so we tag either half.

results.name: land ramp
results.description: Ramp spells that net you more lands on your side of the battlefield.

results.name: landslow
results.description: Cards that prevent or otherwise limit the lands one can play

results.name: larger than landscape
results.description: A subject's immense size is demonstrated by comparison to the landscape around it.
